episodes.title: Epstein survivor: He told me his darkest secrets — then threatened me
episodes.description:
Jeffrey Epstein survivor Rina Oh speaks to LBC News’ Vanessa Baffoe about the grooming, fear and trauma she endured after meeting him as a college-age student.

In this powerful interview, Rina says Epstein used the promise of a scholarship to lure her in, before withdrawing support and creating what she describes as a pattern of chaos, manipulation and abuse. She also says he revealed “dirty secrets” about crimes involving underage girls overseas — and threatened to harm her if she ever spoke out.

Rina explains why she stayed silent for years, reflects on her fight for justice, and says there are still people who should be held accountable for their role in Epstein’s world.

This interview contains distressing content and references to sexual abuse.

LIVE to LBC News: http://l-bc.co/LBCNews

#LBC #LBCNews #JeffreyEpstein #Epstein #RinaOh #EpsteinVictim #Crime #JusticeForSurvivors #EpsteinFiles #USA #USPolitics #WorldNews #Interview
